flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount Vernon Nazarene University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.9k → $37.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount Vernon Nazarene University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.9k → $37.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mount Vernon Nazarene University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount Vernon Nazarene University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (46.0% → 56.2%).
